description_long: This is a rectangular carton of Faragello Gold Premium Grape Juice, featuring a predominantly white and gold color scheme. The front of the carton displays a vivid image of a bunch of red grapes with green leaves, clearly indicating the grape flavor. The brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' is prominently printed in gold letters on both the front and side panels, with additional product information and a 'Premium Grape Juice' label below. One side of the carton contains a detailed nutritional information panel and multilingual product details. The top of the carton is fitted with a white, flat, foldable closure typical of juice cartons, designed for pouring. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, suitable for display in urban retail environments or for use in public spaces.
description: A white and gold rectangular carton of Faragello Gold Premium Grape Juice, featuring a grape cluster illustration and detailed product labeling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and a partial grape cluster image, with the gold and white color scheme.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, a large grape cluster illustration, and product details in gold and white.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with 'FARAGELLO' branding and gold panel, minimal visible text or graphics.
description_view_3: Back view featuring the nutritional information panel, multilingual product details, and the Faragello logo at the bottom.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: bunch of red grapes with green leaves
